prompt: A cinematic, empty circular chamber viewed straight on, rendered in dark moody photorealism. The room is large, symmetrical, and almost entirely black with subtle gray texture on the curved walls. At the exact top center, a single round oculus in the ceiling emits one powerful white spotlight straight downward, forming a dense volumetric shaft of light through faint dust and haze. The beam lands precisely in the middle of the floor, illuminating a circular stone platform with concentric ring patterns and radial wedge segments, like a ceremonial or sci-fi chamber floor. Keep the environment minimal and unoccupied, with 1 ceiling opening, 1 vertical light beam, and 1 circular floor design as the only major elements. Strong contrast, deep shadows, soft atmospheric bloom around the light source, gentle reflections on the floor, centered composition, wide aspect ratio, dramatic high-end cinematic lighting, mysterious sacred-futuristic mood.
